comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
First broadcast of a session by Rock War winners Dirty Weekend.
The Rock War featured China White from Creich, Highway from Birmingham and Euphoria from Cambridgeshire. This was a final. China White won, with Euphoria second and Highway third.

Date confirmed by Tommy mentioning that Alice Cooper performed a gig at the Marquee 'last night'; that was 23 Nov 1989 and the Cult performing 'tonight' and 'tomorrow' at the Wembley Arena; that was 24 Nov 1989 and 25 Nov 1989. Also Tommy auctioned off a Pump tour shirt signed by all of Aerosmith for Children in Need Rupert Beckwith's winning bid is £600, with the proviso that the buyer collects from the studio. which was 'last Friday'; that was 17 Nov 1989.
After the Gothic Slam track, Tommy mentions that he'll be standing in for Alan Freeman on the next Saturday Rock Show, with sessions by Fleetwood Mac.

sessions.details: one and only. Recorded: 1989-10-20. No known commercial release.
